data.content: Planning complete. Existing code already resolves per-action outputs into `StepMetadata`, but prompt rendering still only consumes a flattened `output` token and built-in prompts are hard-coded around `remote_main` versus `pr`. Created child knots `knots-c8f4` (schema/runtime), `knots-0d93` (prompt consumption), and `knots-9727` (regression coverage). Main implementation risk is backward-compatible mapping from legacy outputs to a richer target model; browser/e2e validation may still depend on `knots-bf56` being planned/shipped.
